prompt: A tranquil beach scene at dusk, deserted except for a pair of flip-flops left in the sand next to gentle surf.
prompt_refined: Generate a highly photorealistic image of a serene, deserted beach scene at twilight. The expansive, fine golden sand is untouched by footprints, stretching towards a calm ocean. The sky above is painted with soft, diffused hues of warm orange, faint pink, and muted purple. In the foreground, slightly to the center-right, a well-worn pair of simple flip-flops lies abandoned on the damp sand, positioned just at the edge where gentle, frothy waves subtly recede, reflecting the last light of the day.
objects: expansive golden sand untouched by footprints
twilight sky with soft, diffused hues of warm orange, faint pink, and muted purple
well-worn pair of simple flip-flops, abandoned, in the foreground, slightly to the center-right
gentle, frothy waves subtly receding at the edge of the sand
reflection of the last light of the day on the wet sand and waves
